title: BRIDGES TO CHANGE - 211info
text: SPECIAL PROGRAMS OFFICE BRIDGES TO CHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers transitional housing, treatment, and supportive services for individuals recovering from addiction. Programs are led by peer mentors. Intensive outpatient (IOP) and outpatient substance use disorder treatment are available at multiple locations. 229 NE 181st Avenue Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or visit website for more infomation FEES: Varies by service. OHP accepted for treatment services. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Bus Line 87: Stop ID 9061, 6121 Max Blue Line: 181st Avenue Stop Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Ex-Offender Halfway Houses Mentoring Programs * Substance Use Disorder Issues Sober Living Homes If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SPECIAL PROGRAMS OFFICE
